semantic_name: Consolidation Dip_depth tw-curve tau (writer family WF_CONSOL_DIP)
source_observable: Dip_depth vs tw from aging_observable_dataset.csv row-set
decomposition_method: Stage4→structured export→five-column consolidation reader; provenance in source_run
lineage_requirement: source_run and source_dataset_id must resolve to explicit paths; hash optional future G007
sidecar_requirement: Single-row sidecar tau_vs_Tp_sidecar.csv adjacent to tau_vs_Tp.csv with 17 metadata_field keys (per emission validation)
allowed_use: TAU_TABLE_EXPORT_PAIRING FM_ABS lane on same dataset; diagnostic plots with full tau bundle; register as VALIDATED_EMITTED_SIDECARS when c7e5d41+e58b237-style evidence committed
forbidden_aliases: Track A; Track B; TrackB; TA; TB; P001; Dip tau
notes: Validated baseline lane per aging_baseline_tau_sidecar_emission_validation_01 and aging_baseline_tau_output_sanity_01; not a physics uniqueness claim

semantic_name: Consolidation FM_abs tw-curve tau (writer family WF_CONSOL_FM)
decomposition_method: Same consolidation family as Dip pathway; explicit dipTauPath to paired Dip tau run in runner cfg
component_definition: FM_abs magnitude surface (ABS_ONLY policy for tau lane)
lineage_requirement: Same as Dip; FM rows require has_fm semantics in source tau table where applicable
allowed_use: Pairwise tau comparison vs AGN_WF_CONSOL_DS_DIP_DEPTH_CURVEFIT_V1 on matched Tp CONDITIONAL; ratio downstream per F7T only
forbidden_aliases: Track A; Track B; P002; FM tau
notes: FM writer wiring may require matlab -batch cfg per emission validation when wrapper cannot pass dipTauPath

decomposition_method: Stage5 Gaussian/tanh fit surfaces feeding stage6
component_definition: Per-Tp summary grain PER_TP_SUMMARY_ONLY not tw curves
tau_extraction_method: No standard consolidation tau extractor unless BRIDGE_TAU_TRACK_A implemented
sidecar_requirement: Must tag grain PER_TP_SUMMARY_ONLY; never join to TW_CURVE keys without bridge
allowed_use: Sidecar N/A unless separate tau charter produces WF distinct from WF_CONSOL
forbidden_aliases: Forensic inventory / orientation only; compare to consolidation only after F7V bridge
notes: Track A; Track B; AFM_like; FM_like
column14: F7V forbids identity AFM_like == Dip_depth without bridge

semantic_name: Stage4 direct components before consolidation export

tau_extraction_method: Dip_depth FM_abs filled by orchestrator passes to consolidation—not tau native here

sidecar_requirement: Optional structured export sidecars—not the same as tau_vs_Tp sidecar
allowed_use: Upstream provenance for consolidation inputs; not tau comparison endpoint
notes: Use pathway AGN_WF_CONSOL_* for tau once consolidation CSV exists

sidecar_requirement: Forensic sidecars if emitted—otherwise BLOCK comparison automation
allowed_use: Archive audits; parity tables; never default canonical comparator to baseline lane

component_definition: Modes not Dip_depth FM_abs scalar curves

semantic_name: F7X bridge long / compact ids C_DIP_DEPTH_B C_FM_ABS_B

semantic_name: Clock-ratio combinator downstream of tau CSVs
